models.profiles: A user who can sign in to the app. Each profile is linked to an Account (business) and has a role and approval status.
models.accounts: A client business. Stores the business details captured during onboarding. All hiring threads belong to the account.
models.onboardingPhases: The four MVP phases shown on the How It Works screen. Static content that introduces the hiring process.

relationships: Each Profile belongs to one Account (the business they work for)
Each Account can have multiple Profiles (future: multi-user access)
Onboarding phases are static content, not linked to other entities

onboardingPhases.title: Clarity of Role
onboardingPhases.body: Tell the AI about the role and the person you're hiring. We'll draft the three documents every great hire starts with.

onboardingPhases.title: Advertise for Role
onboardingPhases.body: We write a seven-section job ad that attracts the top 1% and repels the wrong fit.

onboardingPhases.title: Role Outcomes
onboardingPhases.body: We set the five scoring categories we'll use to rank every applicant.

onboardingPhases.title: Ranking
onboardingPhases.body: Upload CVs, the AI scores them against your categories, you decide who to shortlist.
